mapper.select: select t.task_id, t.instance_id, t.node_id, t.approver_user_id, t.status, t.handled_time, p.process_name, i.business_type, i.business_id, i.business_title, n.node_name, concat(ifnull(starter.nick_name, starter.user_name), '（', starter.user_name, '）') as starter_user_name, concat(ifnull(approver.nick_name, approver.user_name), '（', approver.user_name, '）') as approver_user_name, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark from approval_task t left join approval_instance i on i.instance_id = t.instance_id left join approval_process p on p.process_id = i.process_id left join approval_node n on n.node_id = t.node_id left join sys_user starter on starter.user_id = i.starter_user_id left join sys_user approver on approver.user_id = t.approver_user_id where t.task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.insert: insert into approval_task(instance_id, node_id, approver_user_id, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{instanceId}, #{nodeId}, #{approverUserId}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
